title: Ability to Reduce Trial Period manually for an application
excerpt:
I wanted to discuss a feature request regarding the trial periods for applications on the Monday platform. 
As you may know, there are various applications on the platform, each with its unique offering and trial period …

posts.author: lanyere (Yerlan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I wanted to discuss a feature request regarding the trial periods for applications on the Monday platform.

As you may know, there are various applications on the platform, each with its unique offering and trial period requirements. While some applications may benefit from a 14-day trial period, there are others, like ours, that require a shorter trial period for optimal testing and user experience.

Currently, our application offers a trial period of about 3 days for testing purposes, which has been verified multiple times by our clients across different CRM platforms.

Therefore, we kindly request the addition of a feature that would allow developers to set custom trial periods for their applications on the Monday platform. This flexibility would enable us and other developers to tailor the trial period duration to suit our specific needs, ensuring a more accurate representation of our offering and avoiding any confusion or mismatched expectations among our users on a different platforms.

We believe that implementing this feature would not only benefit our application but also empower developers across the platform by providing greater flexibility and control over trial periods, allowing them to optimize user experiences according to their application’s unique functionalities.

Your support in considering this request would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for your attention to this matter, and we look forward to hearing your feedback.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for submitting this request @lanyere !!

Everyone: You can vote for it at the top left corner of the topic

Cheers,
Matias
